---
title: "New Zealand Jury Pool Map"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## New Zealand Map

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(ggrepel)

# Actual Māori counts from the jury pool table
jury_pool_actual <- tibble::tribble(
  ~district,          ~actual_maori,
  "Whangarei",        28,
  "Auckland",         74,
  "Hamilton",         23,
  "Rotorua",          79,
  "Gisborne",         23,
  "Napier",           15,
  "New Plymouth",      4,
  "Palmerston North",  7,
  "Wellington",       28,
  "Nelson",            1,
  "Christchurch",     11,
  "Dunedin",           4,
  "Invercargill",      3
)

# Approximate city-center coordinates
district_coordinates <- tibble::tribble(
  ~district,          ~longitude, ~latitude,
  "Whangarei",        174.32,     -35.73,
  "Auckland",         174.76,     -36.85,
  "Hamilton",         175.28,     -37.78,
  "Rotorua",          176.25,     -38.14,
  "Gisborne",         178.02,     -38.66,
  "Napier",           176.91,     -39.49,
  "New Plymouth",     174.08,     -39.06,
  "Palmerston North", 175.61,     -40.36,
  "Wellington",       174.78,     -41.29,
  "Nelson",           173.28,     -41.27,
  "Christchurch",     172.63,     -43.53,
  "Dunedin",          170.50,     -45.87,
  "Invercargill",     168.35,     -46.41
)

# Join counts and coordinates
jury_map_data <- jury_pool_actual |>
  left_join(district_coordinates, by = "district")

# Convert locations to spatial points
jury_sf <- jury_map_data |>
  st_as_sf(
    coords = c("longitude", "latitude"),
    crs = 4326,
    remove = FALSE
  )

# New Zealand outline
new_zealand <- ne_countries(
  country = "New Zealand",
  scale = "medium",
  returnclass = "sf"
)

# Map
jury_pool_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = new_zealand,
    fill = "grey95",
    color = "grey40",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = jury_sf,
    aes(
      size = actual_maori
    ),
    alpha = 0.4,
    color = "darkblue"
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = jury_map_data,
    aes(
      x = longitude,
      y = latitude,
      label = paste0(district, "\n", actual_maori)
    ),
    size = 3.4,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    box.padding = 0.4,
    point.padding = 0.3,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    seed = 123
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(2.5, 9),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(166, 179.5),
    ylim = c(-47.5, -34),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Māori in the Jury Pool in 1993 Survey",
    subtitle = "Counts are shown for each New Zealand jury district",
    caption = "Source: Trial By Peers."
  ) +
  theme_void(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 17
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 11,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.caption = element_text(
      hjust = 0,
      color = "grey35",
      margin = margin(t = 10)
    )
  )

jury_pool_map
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "plots/actual_maori_jury_pool_map.png",
  plot = jury_pool_map,
  width = 4,
  height = 6.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```
